name: swupdate-lang
description: SWUpdate sw-description language support with completion and validation

swupdateServer.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the language server.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run bundle
scripts.version: node scripts/update-version.js && git add package.json package-lock.json client/package.json client/package-lock.json server/package.json server/package-lock.json
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ..
scripts.install:local: npm run compile && npm run bundle && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-yarn --out swupdate-lang.vsix && code --uninstall-extension borkra.swupdate-lang || true && code --install-extension swupdate-lang.vsix && code-insiders --uninstall-extension borkra.swupdate-lang || true && code-insiders --install-extension swupdate-lang.vsix
